title: Tek N Astra (Sea of Dreams)
description: This mod aims to add way more content to the game, especially post-Ender Dragon part of the game!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WUQbJ_5ff7Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Teknology** is a RPG/Adventure mod inspired by Hypixel Skyblock that aims to add more content to make Post-Ender Dragon more enjoyable. Documentation of the mod is provided in the Patchouli book.

Before getting started be warned that the bosses can cause damage to your base, so don't use those near your house! Another thing, the mod is pretty grindy, not to a tedious degree, but still grindy nonetheless. 

There's also three classes: Melee, Ranger, and Mage with corrosponding weapons and armors.
